name: You get jumped as a killer
description:
“You have became predictable!”

Due to being weak af compared to the other killers. Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Chance, Builderman, Dusekkar, Taph, Two Time, Veeronica, and Jane Doe decide to work together on jumping you! YAY

ALT INTROS:

Initial Message 2 - Same concept as the main message, but only contains the sentinel survivors.

Initial Message 3 - Two Time tried stunning the killer, who was you, but they ended up failing and their fate is now in your hands.

Pfp is official game art
